NotFoundPage.title: 404 - Path Corrupted
NotFoundPage.description: The requested node could not be located in the vault. The path may have been moved or redacted.

FAQPage.title: Frequent Questions
FAQPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Zero-Curve standard.

questions.a1: Yes. Unlike other tools, we never upload your files to a server. All processing happens 100% locally in your browser memory. Your data never leaves your device.
questions.q2: Is there a file size limit?
questions.a2: There is no artificial limit. However, since processing happens in your device's RAM, very large files (2GB+) may depend on your local hardware capabilities.
questions.a3: Once the tool is loaded in your browser, it can function completely offline. No internet connection is required for the actual file processing.
questions.a4: Yes. PrivaFlow is a privacy-first project committed to being free and accessible to everyone, forever.

HowItWorksPage.title: Technical Protocol
HowItWorksPage.subtitle: How PrivaFlow ensures absolute data sovereignty.
HowItWorksPage.intro: Every operation on our platform follows a strict 'Zero-Upload' architecture. Here is the technical breakdown of how we protect your data.

sections.step1Desc: When you load a tool, the entire engine is downloaded to your browser. Your device then becomes a self-contained workstation.
sections.step2Desc: We use high-performance WebAssembly (Wasm) to run C++ and Rust code directly in your browser tab.
sections.step3Desc: Files are processed in a secure browser sandbox. No data packets ever leave your machine.
sections.verificationDesc: You can verify our claims by opening your browser's 'Network' tab. You will see 0.0KB sent to our servers.

PhilosophyPage.title: The Zero-Curve Manifesto
PhilosophyPage.subtitle: Uncompromising privacy in an era of surveillance.

vision.title: Privacy as a Standard
vision.text: We believe privacy shouldn't be a 'setting' you toggle. It must be the foundation.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
sovereignty.text: Your data is your property. We bring absolute sovereignty to the digital space.

design.title: Zero-Curve Design
design.text: Our brand aesthetic reflects our philosophy: sharp edges, no gray areas, and uncompromising lines.

HomePage.title: Your Files Stay with You. Always.
HomePage.philosophyTitle: Privacy Is Not a Feature. It's a Requirement.
HomePage.philosophyBody1: Most online tools work by uploading your files to a server, processing them, and returning the result. That model is inherently broken from a privacy standpoint.
HomePage.philosophyBody2: PrivaFlow was built from the ground up to eliminate this completely. Your files never leave your device — not even for a millisecond.
HomePage.stepsBody: Every tool on PrivaFlow follows the same architecture: load into RAM, process locally, output to device. The cycle is self-contained — completely invisible to any external system.
HomePage.step1Desc: Drag and drop, or click to select. Your file loads directly into browser memory — nothing is sent anywhere.
HomePage.step2Desc: Our WASM and Canvas engines run the operation natively in your tab. Zero server involvement, ever.
HomePage.step3Desc: Get your output instantly. It's created directly in your browser and downloaded straight to your device.
HomePage.pillar1Desc: Every byte of your files is processed inside your own device RAM. We never see it. No logs, no tracking, no server hits.
HomePage.pillar2Desc: We use Web APIs, Canvas, WebAssembly, and PDF.js to run complex operations entirely in your tab — no plugins needed.
HomePage.pillar3Desc: Once loaded, most tools function completely offline. Your data stays inside your device even when the network is gone.

footer.copyright: © 2026 · Zero tracking · Zero uploads · Built for the open web

HomePage.subtitle: Most websites steal your files. We don't. Everything you do stays inside your screen. It's 100% private and 100% free.

redactor.before: A letter with your phone number.
redactor.after: The number is gone under a solid black line forever.

cleanExif.before: A photo that shows exactly where you live.
cleanExif.after: A photo that is safe to share with strangers.

encrypt.before: A secret note anyone can read.
encrypt.after: Jumbled letters that only you can unlock.

compress.before: A 'heavy' photo that is slow to send.
compress.after: A 'light' photo that looks exactly the same but sends instantly.

bgRemover.before: A person in a busy street.
bgRemover.after: The person isolated on a clean background.

heic.before: An iPhone picture that won't open on PC.
heic.after: A standard photo that works everywhere.

mediaConverter.before: A video that won't play on your phone.
mediaConverter.after: A perfect file that plays on any device.

svgToPng.after: A simple photo for everyone to see.

blur.before: A photo showing a private face.
blur.after: The same photo with the face hidden.

merger.after: One clean document with everything inside.

pdfToDocx.before: A file you can't edit or type in.
pdfToDocx.after: A Word file you can fix and change.

unlock.before: A file that asks for a password every time.
unlock.after: A file that opens instantly for anyone.

pdfToImg.before: A document you have to scroll through.

pdfSplit.after: The exact 2 pages you actually needed.

wordToPdf.before: A Word file that anyone can type over.
wordToPdf.after: A clean, professional PDF ready to share.

pdfToPpt.before: A PDF file you want to present on screen.
pdfToPpt.after: A slideshow you can click through.

pptToPdf.before: A presentation you want to lock.
pptToPdf.after: A secure PDF that looks exactly like your slides.

excelToPdf.before: A messy spreadsheet with random numbers.

pdfToExcel.before: Data locked inside a PDF file.
pdfToExcel.after: A spreadsheet you can easily edit and calculate.

htmlToPdf.before: Web code that is hard to read.

scanToPdf.before: Paper documents sitting on your physical desk.
scanToPdf.after: A high-quality digital PDF on your machine.

imageToText.after: A perfectly typed digital text file.

heicToJpg.title: iPhone Asset Fixer
heicToJpg.description: Convert iPhone HEIC files into high-compatibility JPG photos.
heicToJpg.dropDesc: We'll turn it into a standard photo that works everywhere.
heicToJpg.errorDesc: Failed to transcode HEIC. Signal integrity compromised.
heicToJpg.sandboxDesc: HEIF packets are fully decimated and reconstructed locally. Cloud connectivity is strictly restricted.

step1.title: Select HEIC
step1.desc: Drop an Apple HEIC image (high-efficiency container). It stays on your device.

step2.title: Local Decode
step2.desc: Our engine decodes the HEIF stream and extracts the pixel map without server help.

step3.title: Export JPG
step3.desc: The pixel data is recoded into a universal JPG file and saved to your device.

cleanExif.title: Metadata Scrubber
cleanExif.description: Wipe away the 'hidden map' and private tracking data from your pictures.
cleanExif.dropTitle: Drop your photo here to sanitize it.
cleanExif.dropDesc: We'll reconstruct the image on a clean canvas to wipe all metadata.

step1.title: Select Image
step1.desc: Choose the photo you want to sanitize.

step2.title: Metadata Scrubbing
step2.desc: Our engine reconstructs the image on a clean canvas to wipe all EXIF data.

step3.title: Secure Export
step3.desc: Download your fully anonymous photo safely.

encrypt.title: Secure Note Encryption
encrypt.description: Lock your private writing inside a cryptographic vault only you can open.
encrypt.passwordPlaceholder: Type a key only you know...

step1.title: Write Your Note
step1.desc: Type or paste the sensitive text you want to secure from prying eyes.

step2.title: Apply Cipher
step2.desc: Enter a secret key. We use AES-256 to turn your text into an unreadable scramble.

step3.title: Store Anywhere
step3.desc: Copy the encrypted block. Only someone with your exact key can ever read it again.

encrypt.cryptoDesc: Uses PBKDF2 for key derivation and AES-256-GCM for authenticated encryption. Keys never leave browser memory.

blur.title: Blur Tool
blur.description: Hide faces or sensitive things in your photos with a privacy-first blur brush.
blur.dropTitle: Drop your image here to blur.
blur.dropDesc: We'll process image pixels locally in your browser.
blur.sandboxDesc: Pixels are transformed in a volatile HTML5 canvas. Zero persistent artifacts.

step1.title: Drop Your Image
step1.description: Pick any photo you want to sharpen or fix. It stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

step2.title: Adjust the Strength
step2.description: Use the slider to control how sharp the result should be. More strength means a clearer image.

step3.title: Save the Result
step3.description: Click process and download your enhanced image instantly.

enhancer.title: Image Enhancer
enhancer.description: Sharpen blurry photos and restore clarity with local professional-grade filters.
enhancer.dropDesc: We'll restore fidelity and sharpen details locally.
enhancer.sandboxDesc: Pixels are reconstructed in a volatile memory buffer. No persistent traces remain.

step1.title: Load Your Photo
step1.desc: Drop any blurry or out-of-focus image. It stays on your hardware — zero uploads.

step2.title: Dial in Clarity
step2.desc: Use the intensity slider to calibrate the sharpening strength for your specific image.

step3.title: Save High-Res
step3.desc: Process the enhancement and download your crisp, professional resulting asset instantly.

bgRemover.title: Background Remover
bgRemover.description: Isolate subjects and remove backgrounds instantly — 100% locally.
bgRemover.dropDesc: We'll remove the background using local AI processing.
bgRemover.sandboxDesc: The removal model runs in your browser's RAM. No data is stored.

step1.title: Select Photo
step1.desc: Drop any image with a clear subject (person, product, etc.). It stays on your device.

step2.title: AI Isolation
step2.desc: Our local WASM model calculates the subject's edges and ignores the background.

step3.title: Save Transparent
step3.desc: Download your subject as a high-quality transparent PNG file instantly.

textToDocx.title: Text to Word
textToDocx.description: Convert plain text into an editable Word document.

step1.title: Drop Your Text
step1.desc: Load the text file you want to convert into a document.

step2.title: Local Synthesis
step2.desc: Our engine reconstructs your text inside a native .docx bitstream.

step3.title: Download Word
step3.desc: Get your professional Word document instantly.

textToDocx.errorDesc: Synthesis failed. Please ensure the file is a valid text file.
textToDocx.howThisWorksDesc: Your text is read and reconstructed as a Word document entirely in your browser.

docxToText.title: Word to Text
docxToText.description: Extract raw text from a Word document.

step1.title: Drop Your Word File
step1.desc: Load the .docx document you want to extract text from.

step2.title: Local Extraction
step2.desc: Our engine parses the OpenXML structure to recover all text layers.

step3.title: Download Text
step3.desc: Get your clean text file instantly.

docxToText.errorDesc: Extraction failed. Please ensure the file is a valid .docx document.
docxToText.howThisWorksDesc: The Word file is decompressed and its XML content is parsed to extract all text locally.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF
wordToPdf.description: Change a Word document perfectly into a PDF.
wordToPdf.dropDesc: or click to browse your folders

step1.title: Select Document
step1.desc: Choose the file you want to convert.

step2.title: Process Locally
step2.desc: We convert it entirely in your browser.

step3.title: Download Safely
step3.desc: Download your new file securely.

imageToText.title: Image to Text
imageToText.description: Private, local OCR for extracting printed text from images.
imageToText.dropHint: Drag document image or click to upload
imageToText.privacyNote: Images are processed locally using Tesseract.js. No pixel data ever leaves your browser vault.

step1.title: Capture or Upload
step1.desc: Take a photo of your document or upload an existing image file.

step2.title: AI Extraction
step2.desc: Our local OCR engine analyzes the image structure and identifies printed text patterns.

step3.title: Export Digital Text
step3.desc: Copy the results to your clipboard or download them as a clean text file.

SecurityProof.trustStatement: WE DON'T ASK FOR YOUR TRUST; WE PROVE IT.
SecurityProof.trustExplanation: Since your files never leave your screen, we couldn't see them even if we wanted to.
SecurityProof.auditDesc: We believe in verification, not just trust. Here is how you can prove our security for yourself:
SecurityProof.stepNetwork: Open Browser DevTools (F12) and select the 'Network' tab.
SecurityProof.stepProcess: Select any tool and upload a file. Watch the monitor.
SecurityProof.stepResult: Observe that zero files or data packets are sent to our servers.
SecurityProof.guaranteeDesc: Our architecture is legally and technically incapable of seeing your data.

PrivacyReport.label: Audit & Compliance
PrivacyReport.title: NO-SERVER ARCHITECTURE
PrivacyReport.subtitle: How PrivaFlow protects your data without ever seeing it.

steps.step1Desc: Every single computation — whether it's PDF redaction, background removal, or image enhancement — happens entirely within your browser using WASM (WebAssembly) and FFmpeg.wasm. No data is sent to a backend.
steps.step2Desc: We do not have a database for your files. We do not have a bucket for your uploads. There is nowhere for your data to go except your own local storage.
steps.step3Desc: Our entire source code is available on GitHub. Anyone can inspect how we handle data and verify that no telemetry or sneaky tracking scripts exist.
steps.step4Desc: Files are processed in ephemeral browser memory. Once you refresh the page or close the tab, the processing environment is wiped clean.

ContactPage.label: Contact
ContactPage.title: Let's Talk.
ContactPage.body1: We built PrivaFlow for you. Your feedback, bug reports, and feature ideas shape every update. Send us a message and we typically respond within 24 hours.
ContactPage.successDesc: We got your message and will get back to you within 24 hours. Thank you.
ContactPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us what's on your mind...
ContactPage.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at hello@privaflow.com
ContactPage.privacyNote: PrivaFlow is built with privacy-first principles. Your contact information is only used to respond to your message and is never shared or sold.

validation.name: Name is required
validation.message: Message must be at least 10 characters
